prompts.name: GNHF Validation and CI Repair
prompts.sprintPathRole: Repair a bounded failing validation or CI lane
prompts.useThisWhen: A required test, validator, fixture, schema, or workflow is reproducibly failing.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: The work is a new feature rather than a reproducible required failure.
prompts.inspectFirst: Exact failing command, exit evidence, related tests and workflow routing.
prompts.expectedOutput: Root-cause repair commits and executable regression proof.
prompts.acceptanceGate: Required failures pass without suppression or downgrade.
prompts.authority: Required validation, fixture, schema, test, and CI repair
prompts.proofCeiling: Required failures pass without suppression or downgrade.
prompts.text:
gnhf `
--agent opencode `
--worktree `
--max-iterations 5 `
--max-tokens 450000 `
--prevent-sleep on `
--stop-when "The bounded reproducible required failures pass with regression proof, while optional external absences remain honest evidence-backed skips." `
"Repo: xyz_repo_or_path

Sprint: Validation and CI repair
Lane: reproducible required failures

Failing command:
- xyz_failure_command

Required checks:
- xyz_required_checks

Objective:
Reproduce the failure, identify the root cause, implement the smallest correct repair, and add executable regression proof.

Owned scope:
- xyz_owned_scope

Rules:
- Keep at most five related failures.
- Distinguish product, test, fixture, environment, and workflow-routing defects.
- Rerun the narrow failure after each repair.
- Run xyz_canonical_proof after shared contract changes.
- Never delete a required check, convert FAIL to SKIP without evidence, suppress logs, or inflate timeouts to hide a hang.

Forbidden:
- xyz_forbidden_scope
- push, credentials, live targets, tool installation, destructive Git

Report:
- root causes
- commits and files
- regression proof
- final results
- external skips
- git status"

prompts.name: GNHF Harness Hardening
prompts.sprintPathRole: Harden offline contracts, fixtures, repeatability, and artifacts
prompts.useThisWhen: An offline harness needs deterministic parity, failure paths, or artifact integrity.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: The work requires live targets or real packages.
prompts.inspectFirst: Canonical validator, schemas, fixtures, artifact root, repeat-run behavior.
prompts.expectedOutput: Bounded harness commits and final PASS/SKIP/FAIL evidence.
prompts.nextStep: Use P11/P12; route live proof to P08.
prompts.acceptanceGate: Zero unexplained required failures and contained evidence.
prompts.authority: Offline harness, artifact, fixture, schema, and CI mutation
prompts.proofCeiling: Zero unexplained required failures and contained evidence.
prompts.text:
gnhf `
--agent opencode `
--worktree `
--max-iterations 6 `
--max-tokens 550000 `
--prevent-sleep on `
--stop-when "The selected offline harness gaps are committed and validated, the canonical matrix has zero unexplained required failures, and generated evidence remains contained and ignored." `
"Repo: xyz_repo_or_path

Sprint: Offline harness hardening
Lane: contracts, fixtures, repeatability, artifacts

Canonical validator:
- xyz_canonical_proof

Artifact root:
- xyz_artifact_root

Objective:
Build a ranked queue of at most five evidence-backed harness defects and complete them one coherent commit at a time.

Priorities:
- schema runtime parity
- negative failure contracts
- stale artifact and run collision prevention
- repeat-run idempotency
- result count and report agreement
- artifact registry and CI enforcement

Owned scope:
- xyz_owned_scope

Rules:
- Run the canonical matrix before and after shared changes.
- Required failures remain failures.
- No live targets, VMs, real packages, providers, machine mutation, or generated evidence commits.
- Do not invent a replacement framework.

Report:
- initial and final matrix
- queue dispositions
- commits
- artifacts
- proof ceiling
- live-only gaps
- git status"

prompts.name: GNHF Technician Experience
prompts.sprintPathRole: Build one clear technician or operator workflow
prompts.useThisWhen: Users should not need to recover commands from chat or guess the terminal.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: The user only needs immediate coaching rather than repo mutation.
prompts.inspectFirst: Implemented entry points, flags, logs, docs, examples, failure modes.
prompts.acceptanceGate: One clear implemented operator path remains.
prompts.authority: Launcher, help, docs, examples, and operator contracts
prompts.proofCeiling: One clear implemented operator path remains.
prompts.text:
gnhf `
--agent opencode `
--worktree `
--max-iterations 4 `
--max-tokens 350000 `
--prevent-sleep on `
--stop-when "The selected operator workflow has one clear validated entry point, accurate recovery guidance, and no remaining owned usability blocker." `
"Repo: xyz_repo_or_path

Sprint: Technician experience
Lane: launcher, help, guide, examples

Audience:
- xyz_audience

Workflow:
- xyz_workflow

Objective:
Turn implemented behavior into one clear operator path that does not require recovering commands from chat.

Owned scope:
- xyz_owned_scope

Priorities:
- canonical one-click entry point
- exact terminal labels
- plan versus apply distinction
- log and artifact locations
- failure and recovery steps
- help, examples, navigation, documentation contracts

Rules:
- Validate every command and path that can be checked offline.
- Do not invent capabilities or create competing entry points.
- Preserve safe defaults and manual authentication.
- No elevation, deployment, paid calls, secrets, or live-proof claims unless explicitly owned.

Report:
- usability gaps repaired
- commits and files
- commands verified
- proof ceiling
- field acceptance still required
- git status"

prompts.name: GNHF Dependency Maintenance
prompts.sprintPathRole: Upgrade one named dependency or toolchain scope
prompts.useThisWhen: One evidence-backed version or toolchain update is ready for bounded execution.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: The upgrade scope is broad, interactive, or unverified.
prompts.inspectFirst: Official release/advisory, manifests, lockfiles, support policy, tests.
prompts.expectedOutput: Reproducible upgrade commits and compatibility proof.
prompts.acceptanceGate: Only the named scope changes and checks pass.
prompts.authority: Named dependency manifests, lockfiles, and compatibility repairs
prompts.proofCeiling: Only the named scope changes and checks pass.
prompts.text:
gnhf `
--agent opencode `
--worktree `
--max-iterations 4 `
--max-tokens 350000 `
--prevent-sleep on `
--stop-when "The named dependency scope is reproducibly updated, direct compatibility repairs pass, and no unrelated package or toolchain changed." `
"Repo: xyz_repo_or_path

Sprint: Dependency maintenance
Lane: one named upgrade

Dependency scope:
- xyz_dependency_scope

Target:
- xyz_target_versions

Objective:
Upgrade or pin only the named dependency or toolchain and repair direct compatibility failures.

Owned scope:
- xyz_owned_scope

Rules:
- Use official release or advisory evidence when available.
- Update lockfiles only with the repository-supported tool.
- Keep at most five items: manifest, lockfile, direct repair, tests, related docs or CI.
- Do not perform a broad refresh.
- Do not fabricate lockfiles when tooling is unavailable.
- Run targeted tests and xyz_canonical_proof after shared build changes.

Forbidden:
- xyz_forbidden_scope
- publish, release, push, credentials, unverified binaries, package caches

Report:
- version change
- manifests and lockfiles
- compatibility commits
- commands and results
- migration and rollback risk
- git status"

prompts.name: GNHF PR Branch Repair
prompts.sprintPathRole: Repair one exact PR branch locally
prompts.useThisWhen: An exact branch has review, CI, drift, regression, or scope defects.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: The exact branch or target base cannot be identified.
prompts.inspectFirst: Branch and HEAD, target-base diff, review and failing-check evidence.
prompts.expectedOutput: Scoped local repair commits and a review-ready final diff.
prompts.nextStep: Human push/review, then P15 or P12.
prompts.acceptanceGate: Exact-head repair queue is empty and local proof passes.
prompts.authority: Exact PR-branch local repair; no remote mutation by default
prompts.proofCeiling: Exact-head repair queue is empty and local proof passes.
prompts.text:
gnhf `
--agent opencode `
--worktree `
--max-iterations 5 `
--max-tokens 450000 `
--prevent-sleep on `
--stop-when "The exact branch repair queue is empty, all reproducible owned failures pass, and the final diff is coherent, scoped, and ready for human review." `
"Repo: xyz_repo_or_path

Sprint: PR branch repair
Lane: review, CI, drift, regression

Pull request or branch:
- xyz_pr_number

Target base:
- xyz_target_base

Objective:
Repair the exact branch locally. Address evidence-backed review, CI, drift, regression, or scope defects one coherent commit at a time.

Owned scope:
- xyz_owned_scope

Rules:
- Confirm branch, HEAD, and base diff before mutation.
- Keep at most five exact-head repairs.
- Preserve unrelated contributor work.
- Run the narrow failing check and xyz_canonical_proof after shared changes.
- Do not merge, close, approve, push, alter PR metadata, or claim remote checks passed without evidence.
- Stop if the exact branch cannot be identified safely.

Report:
- starting HEAD and repair queue
- commits and files
- validation
- final diff
- pending remote actions
- proof ceiling
- git status"
